run_purpose: Observe cross_modal_corroboration windows and noise flags; diagnostic only.

cases.expected_behavior: When OCR runs: same temporal window may list runtime_log, video_frame, ocr_text (+ screenshot optional). overlap_strength strong with 3+ modalities.
Single gameplay screenshot, no log, no video → typically one weak window (runtime_screenshot only) unless OCR adds ocr_text in same window.
Video frames only → weak windows with video_frame; expect video_frames_present_without_temporal_overlap noise when no co-modalities.
Runtime log lines only → windows with runtime_log only; diversity may reflect log presence without visuals.
Video near t≈0, screenshot far (~8000s), log far (~9999) → multiple single-modality weak windows; union of modalities ≥3 → multimodal_presence_split_across_windows flag likely.
